items.text: Messaged them late Sunday evening and got a response by morning with three options. We viewed two apartments, loved the first one near Heroes Alley. Been living here 8 months now and couldn't be happier. No pressure at all.
items.author: Alexander

items.text: Was a bit nervous about the paperwork — contract's in Georgian and I don't speak a word of it. They walked me through everything patiently, explained all the details. Wouldn't have figured it out on my own. Great service.
items.author: Helen

items.text: Moved to Batumi with a clear intention — to live here. They helped us find a studio first, then upgraded us to a bigger flat without any hassle. A year and a half in, zero regrets. Straightforward, honest people.
items.author: Dmitry

whyBatumi.title: Why Choose Batumi for Life & Business
whyBatumi.subtitle: A modern, comfortable environment for entrepreneurs, remote professionals, and families who value stability, freedom, and international opportunities.
whyBatumi.tagline: Batumi — the ideal balance of freedom, stability, and growth

items.title: Tax Advantages
items.text: One of the most favorable tax regimes in the region. Individual entrepreneurs pay just 1%, enabling efficient business development with minimal burden.

items.title: Free & Open Internet
items.text: Fast, stable internet with zero blocks. Telegram, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook — all work without restrictions or VPN.

items.title: Modern Education
items.text: European-standard schooling, instruction in English and German, Bologna system. No ideological pressure.

items.title: Easy Residency & Visas
items.text: The residency permit process is straightforward. Georgian residency also keeps the door open for Schengen visa applications.

items.title: Banking Infrastructure
items.text: Foreigners can open accounts and get Visa and Mastercard cards. Simple for working with international partners and clients.

items.title: Transport Connectivity
items.text: Batumi Airport operates reliably with direct flights to Europe and the CIS. Solid logistics, no disruptions.

items.title: Sanction-Free Zone
items.text: International shipments, cross-border bank transfers, and global business — all without restrictions.

items.title: Crypto Flexibility
items.text: No strict bans on digital assets. Cryptocurrency can be used within the framework of current Georgian law.
